name: get_debug_cores
short_description: Get a list of debug cores in the current design
full_help:
get_debug_cores

Description: 
Get a list of debug cores in the current design

Syntax: 
get_debug_cores  [-filter <arg>] [-of_objects <args>] [-regexp] [-nocase]
                 [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of debug_core objects

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-of_objects]  Get cores of these debug ports or nets
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match debug cores against patterns
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Object, Debug, XDC

arguments.description: Get cores of these debug ports or nets
Perform case-insensitive matching (valid only when -regexp specified)
Suspend message limits during command execution
